name: Competitor Intel Dashboard
tagline: Daily pricing & catalog tracking — on autopilot
description: A private dashboard that scrapes competitor websites every night and delivers clean price-change alerts to your inbox. Built for e-commerce brands tired of manual checks.
idealFor: E-commerce brands, Amazon sellers, retail chains

name: Lead Enrichment Engine
tagline: Turn a company name into a full sales profile
description: Paste a list of company names — get back emails, social profiles, tech stack, and employee count. Built for agencies and B2B sales teams who need data fast.

name: White-Label Client Portal
tagline: Your clients log in — you look professional at scale
description: A branded portal where your clients track project progress, approve designs, and download deliverables. Built for freelancers and small agencies scaling up.

name: Business Automation Hub
tagline: Connect your tools — kill the repetitive work
description: Custom integrations between your CRM, email, spreadsheets, and messaging apps. When off-the-shelf Zapier isn't enough, we build the exact workflow you need.
idealFor: Operations teams, growing SMBs, SaaS startups
